\tzpentry{ID3436}{Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3436 introduces Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$ \Delta\phi\left(\frac{547}{512}\right) = \pi\left(\frac{35}{512}\right) \approx 12.3^\circ $$
